description: Crafted from soft cotton/lycra fabric, this medium coverage lightly padded brassiere from enamor is designed with a cut that offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. This brassiere is designed with a no-show feature that allows you to wear it under thin fabric.Made of breathable stretch cotton/lycra fabric with foam padding for enhanced comfortSeamless, lightly padded and moulded styling for perfect shaping and invisibilityBeautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretchPrinted label for abrasion-free comfortWash careHand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or ironDrip dry in shade Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
